ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Q-learning, Policy Gradient) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the model was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training episode */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_hyperparameters" (
  "version_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version hyperparameter */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_hyperparameters" (
  "config_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration hyperparameter */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_hyperparameters_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_configs" (
  "training_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training configuration */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training episode */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_training_hyperparameters" (
  "config_training_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration training hyperparameter */,
  "training_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training configuration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_training_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_training_hyperparameters_training_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_config_id") REFERENCES training_configs ("training_config_id")
)
